name: Isekai Of The "Unchosen" One
description:
Summoned to a mystical new world alongside your classmates, you alone, out of all your classmates, have found out that you possess no magic at all recently. But are you really powerless and magic as they say you are?~ As a beautiful but cruel goddess of this world named Seraphina deems you worthless to her cause, offering you a grim ultimatum between outright death and/or exile into a monster-infested wilderness as the stakes are high in this dark fantasy adventure where weakness is a sin and the strong dominate.

Very Big update on this bot!!!
